Module chariot
Package chariot.api

Interface Games

All Known Subinterfaces:
GamesAuth
public interface Games
Access games played on Lichess.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Result<Game>
    byChannel(Enums.Channel channel)
    byChannel(Channel, Consumer)
    Result<Game>
    byChannel(Enums.Channel channel, Consumer<Games.ChannelFilter> params)
    Get a list of ongoing games for a given TV channel.
    default Result<Game>
    byChannel(Function<Enums.Channel.Provider,Enums.Channel> channel)

    default Result<Game>
    byChannel(Function<Enums.Channel.Provider,Enums.Channel> channel, Consumer<Games.ChannelFilter> params)
    byChannel(Channel, Consumer)
    default Result<Game>
    byGameId(String gameId)
    byGameId(String, Consumer)
    Result<Game>
    byGameId(String gameId, Consumer<Games.GameParams> params)
    Download one game.
    Ongoing games have their last 3 moves omitted, after move 5.
    default Result<Game>
    byGameIds(String... gameIds)
    byGameIds(Set, Consumer)
    default Result<Game>
    byGameIds(Set<String> gameIds)
    byGameIds(Set, Consumer)
    Result<Game>
    byGameIds(Set<String> gameIds, Consumer<Games.GameParams> params)
    Download games by IDs.
    Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
    300 IDs can be submitted.
    Ongoing games have their last 3 moves omitted, after move 5.
    default Result<Game>
    byUserId(String userId)
    byUserId(String, Consumer)
    Result<Game>
    byUserId(String userId, Consumer<Games.SearchFilter> params)
    Download all games of any user
    Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
    The game stream is throttled, depending on who is making the request: Anonymous request: 20 games per second Authenticated: 30 games per second.
    default Result<Game>
    currentByUserId(String userId)
    currentByUserId(String, Consumer)
    Result<Game>
    currentByUserId(String userId, Consumer<Games.GameParams> params)
    Download the ongoing game, or the last game played, of a user.
    If the game is ongoing, the 3 last moves are omitted.
    Result<GameImport>
    importGame(String pgn)
    Import a game from PGN.
    Rate limiting: 200 games per hour for OAuth requests, 100 games per hour for anonymous requests.
    See GamesAuth.importGame(java.lang.String) for authenticated access.
    To broadcast ongoing games, consider pushing to a broadcast instead.
    Result<TablebaseResult>
    lookupTablebase(String fen)
    Lookup positions from the Lichess tablebase server.
    Result<TablebaseResult>
    lookupTablebaseAntichess(String fen)
    Lookup Antichess positions from the Lichess tablebase server.
    Result<TablebaseResult>
    lookupTablebaseAtomic(String fen)
    Lookup Atomic positions from the Lichess tablebase server.

    openingExplorerMasters(Consumer<Games.MastersBuilder> params)
    Find Masters games from Opening Explorer

    Fetches the PGN of specified game from Masters OTB database

    default Result<StreamGame>
    streamGamesByUserIds(boolean withCurrentGames, String... userIds)
    streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set)
    Result<StreamGame>
    streamGamesByUserIds(boolean withCurrentGames, Set<String> userIds)
    Stream the games played between a list of users, in real time.
    Only games where both players are part of the list are included.
    Maximum number of users: 300.
    default Result<StreamGame>
    streamGamesByUserIds(String... userIds)
    streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set)
    Result<StreamGame>
    streamGamesByUserIds(Set<String> userIds)
    streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set)
    Result<StreamMove>
    streamMovesByGameId(String gameId)
    Stream positions and moves of any ongoing game.
    A description of the game is sent as a first message.
    Result<TVChannels>
    tvChannels()
    Get basic info about the best games being played for each speed and variant, but also computer games and bot games.
    Result<TVFeed>
    tvFeed()
    Stream positions and moves of the current TV game.
    A summary of the game is sent as a first message, and when the featured game changes.

  • Method Details

    • byGameId

      Result<Game> byGameId(String gameId, Consumer<Games.GameParams> params)
      Download one game.
      Ongoing games have their last 3 moves omitted, after move 5.

    • currentByUserId

      Result<Game> currentByUserId(String userId, Consumer<Games.GameParams> params)
      Download the ongoing game, or the last game played, of a user.
      If the game is ongoing, the 3 last moves are omitted.

    • byUserId

      Result<Game> byUserId(String userId, Consumer<Games.SearchFilter> params)
      Download all games of any user
      Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
      The game stream is throttled, depending on who is making the request:
      • Anonymous request: 20 games per second
      • Authenticated: 30 games per second.
      • Authenticated, downloading your own games: 60 games per second.
      See currentByUserId(String, Consumer) for authenticated access.

    • byGameIds

      Result<Game> byGameIds(Set<String> gameIds, Consumer<Games.GameParams> params)
      Download games by IDs.
      Games are sorted by reverse chronological order (most recent first)
      300 IDs can be submitted.
      Ongoing games have their last 3 moves omitted, after move 5.

    • importGame

      Result<GameImport> importGame(String pgn)
      Import a game from PGN.
      Rate limiting: 200 games per hour for OAuth requests, 100 games per hour for anonymous requests.
      See GamesAuth.importGame(java.lang.String) for authenticated access.
      To broadcast ongoing games, consider pushing to a broadcast instead. See BroadcastsAuth.pushPgnByRoundId(java.lang.String, java.lang.String)

    • openingExplorerMastersOTB

      Result<Pgn> openingExplorerMastersOTB(String gameId)
      Fetches the PGN of specified game from Masters OTB database
      Parameters:
      gameId - Example: "aAbqI4ey"

    • openingExplorerMasters

      Result<ExploreResult.OpeningDB> openingExplorerMasters(Consumer<Games.MastersBuilder> params)
      Find Masters games from Opening Explorer

    • openingExplorerLichess

      Result<ExploreResult.OpeningDB> openingExplorerLichess(Consumer<Games.LichessBuilder> params)
      Find Lichess games from Opening Explorer

    • openingExplorerPlayer

      Result<ExploreResult.OpeningPlayer> openingExplorerPlayer(String userId, Consumer<Games.PlayerBuilder> params)
      Find Player games from Opening Explorer

    • lookupTablebase

      Result<TablebaseResult> lookupTablebase(String fen)
      Lookup positions from the Lichess tablebase server.

    • lookupTablebaseAtomic

      Result<TablebaseResult> lookupTablebaseAtomic(String fen)
      Lookup Atomic positions from the Lichess tablebase server.

    • lookupTablebaseAntichess

      Result<TablebaseResult> lookupTablebaseAntichess(String fen)
      Lookup Antichess positions from the Lichess tablebase server.

    • byChannel

      Result<Game> byChannel(Enums.Channel channel, Consumer<Games.ChannelFilter> params)
      Get a list of ongoing games for a given TV channel.

    • tvChannels

      Result<TVChannels> tvChannels()
      Get basic info about the best games being played for each speed and variant, but also computer games and bot games.

    • tvFeed

      Result<TVFeed> tvFeed()
      Stream positions and moves of the current TV game.
      A summary of the game is sent as a first message, and when the featured game changes.

    • streamGamesByUserIds

      Result<StreamGame> streamGamesByUserIds(boolean withCurrentGames, Set<String> userIds)
      Stream the games played between a list of users, in real time.
      Only games where both players are part of the list are included.
      Maximum number of users: 300.
      Parameters:
      withCurrentGames - whether to include ongoing games or not. Default: true
      userIds -

    • streamGamesByUserIds

      Result<StreamGame> streamGamesByUserIds(Set<String> userIds)
      streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set)

    • streamGamesByUserIds

      default Result<StreamGame> streamGamesByUserIds(boolean withCurrentGames, String... userIds)
      streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set)

    • streamGamesByUserIds

      default Result<StreamGame> streamGamesByUserIds(String... userIds)
      streamGamesByUserIds(boolean, Set)

    • streamMovesByGameId

      Result<StreamMove> streamMovesByGameId(String gameId)
      Stream positions and moves of any ongoing game.
      A description of the game is sent as a first message. Then a message is sent each time a move is played. Finally a description of the game is sent when it finishes, and the stream is closed.
      After move 5, the stream intentionally remains 3 moves behind the game status, as to prevent cheat bots from using this API.
      No more than 8 game streams can be opened at the same time from the same IP address.

    • byGameId

      default Result<Game> byGameId(String gameId)
      byGameId(String, Consumer)
